title: Kid and Law Challenge Big Mom
description: On pages 22–25, this part focuses on Unknown person #21, Unknown person #22, Unknown person #23, Unknown person #24, Marco as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Great OBSER- VATION HAK1,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: All thanks to my gene- rous advice...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: It's alright, I don't need any thanks.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the morning, and I was

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Gya AA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Damn it, I got stabbed !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: care- less again huh, teach?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: White- Beard's territory

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Food- Valten

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Like I said, all you did was get stabbed and make a racket over it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh? That doesn't change the fact that I contributed, thatch!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Besides, didn't you see how I took out that 20an captain?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You just finished him off after ace already beat him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, that's right, it was you, flame rookie.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Say, I've been hearing a rumor...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: that you'll join our crew...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once you've tried and failed 100 times to take on pops. That right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: WHATA-!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: I wasn't even keeping count...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: He'd probably go on forever.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was me who came up with that.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: for your reference, he's on his 46th loss.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Zehahahahahahaha! So many tries and he hasn't even gotten pops to use his devil fruit ability!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: What's so funny, you big bearded oaf!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How about I give you a taste of my devil fruit power!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Don't fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Once you've eaten, we're going shopping.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Pops has the quake- quake fruit,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Commander Marco has a bird-bird fruit,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and common-der Jozu has the diamond- diamond fruit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I kinda expected it, but that's a lot of abilities.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: And you've got the flame- flame fruit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: As a cook, I'm pretty JEA- Louis!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you want it, you've gotta kill him!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
